events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: residential block/brick laying, observed field condition: ladder reinforcement spacing exceeded. Work rough-complete. Reference TMS 402/602. Ladder reinforcement (joint reinforcement) spacing requirements per TMS 402/602: max spacing 16 in. o.c. for masonry walls? Actually prescriptive code: joint reinforcement required at 16 inches on center vertically unless otherwise designed. Exceeded spacing means non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk? Reinforcement spacing affects crack control/structural capacity; residential could be medium/high. Since it's a defect but not imminent collapse maybe medium. But if load-bearing wall, high? Need choose. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80. value not asked 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0. order empty. workable empty. findings: ladder reinforcement spacing exceeds TMS 602 prescriptive maximum. actions: remove/repair as required, install additional ladder reinforcement at proper spacing, verify with engineer/inspector. rationale. references: TMS 402/602. Need ensure JSON valid.
